references.text: Jacobs, M. 1960. Capparidaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 6: 61-105

Su, J-X, W Wang, L-B Zhang & Z-D Chen. 2012. Phylogenetic placement of two enigmatic genera, Borthwickia and Stixis, based on molecular and pollen data, and the description of a new family of Brassicales, Borthwickiaceae. Taxon 61: 601-611

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 3 June 2018

species.citation: (Turcz.) Merr. , Publ. Bur. Sci. Gov. Lab. 35 (1906) 72 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 213; Jacobs, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 6 (1960) 97; ≡ Roydsia philippinensis Turcz. , Bull. Soc. Imp. Naturalistes Moscou 27 (1854) 329.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. BASILAN, LUZON: Bataan, Laguna, MINDANAO: Cotabato, Davao, Davao del Sur, Surigao.
species.notes: Low and medium elevation forests. Fl. Jan-Dec; fr. Mar-Apr.
